sentences.text: The Miller assured Hans that he would give him the wheelbarrow, so Hans should not worry.
Hans felt very happy and thought the Miller was truly generous, which made his round face glow with pleasure.
I can fix it easily because I have a plank of wood at home.
A plank of wood is exactly what I need for my barn roof, said the Miller.
